creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

I should have clearer, apologies. turses is 2/3 compatible. I didn't mean it removed 2.x support or that I wanted a test with Python 3.x.

Can you test the latest turses (the author has updated the PyPi sdist since my last comment) with the latest tweepy, on Python 2.7, using a virtualenv & pip to make sure it just works.

Unfortuntely the test suite of tweepy is frustratingly complex to get working, which is why I'm asking for an end-user test. I can take care of the port updates once confirmed.
